Constitution.name: Constitution
Constitution.desc: A high constitution stat decreases the effectiveness of potions and poisions

Perception.name: Perception
Perception.desc: A high perception stat allows you to get more information from researching and harvesting

Luck.name: Luck
Luck.desc: A high Luck stat allows you to find rarer items more often

Dexterity.name: Dexterity
Dexterity.desc: A high dexterity stat increases the quality of crafted items
